MASTER SUBSCRIPTION AGREEMENT

between SalesForge CRM ("Vendor") and Customer Corp. ("Customer")
Effective Date: March 1, 2023

1. SERVICES
1.1 Vendor shall provide Customer with access to the SalesForge customer
relationship management platform (the "Services").

2. TERM
2.1 This Agreement commences on the Effective Date and continues for an
initial term of thirty-six (36) months.

3. RENEWAL
3.1 This Agreement shall automatically renew for successive one-year terms
absent written notice of non-renewal at least sixty (60) days before the
end of the then-current term.

4. CUSTOMER OBLIGATIONS
4.1 Customer shall maintain accurate active-user counts within the admin
console at all times.

5. DATA
5.1 Vendor shall not use Customer data to train models for other customers.

6. FEES AND PAYMENT
6.1 Customer shall pay all fees in accordance with this Section 6.
6.2 Customer shall pay $15.00 per active user per month.
6.3 Invoices are issued monthly and due within thirty (30) days.
6.4 [Reserved]
6.5 [Reserved]
6.6 Beginning at each annual renewal starting March 1, 2026, fees may
increase by up to five percent (5%) per year, not to exceed five percent
(5%) cumulative above the then-current rate.
6.7 Mid-cycle changes shall be prorated daily.

7. STORAGE ADD-ON
7.1 Additional data storage is billed at $0.20 per GB for the first 500 GB
per month and $0.12 per GB for each GB thereafter.

8. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
8.1 Neither party's aggregate liability under this Agreement shall exceed
the fees paid by Customer in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim.

9. GOVERNING LAW
9.1 This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of California.
